question: How much will I save by taking the train from the airport to my hotel instead of a taxi?

retrieval_results.context:
User is comparing taxi costs to train and subway fares from Narita Airport to Tokyo.
User is seeking confirmation on a potential $10 train fare from Narita Airport to their Shinjuku hotel.
User is comparing taxi costs to airport bus fares from Narita Airport to Tokyo.
User was informed that a $10 train fare from Narita Airport to Shinjuku is unlikely.
User estimates taxi fare from Narita Airport to Tokyo at $60.
